headline: Want $4,087 in Passive Income? Invest $10,000 Into These 3 High-Yielding Stocks
summary: Earned income has a ceiling. Passive income from dividend-paying stocks operates differently: capital does the work, distributions arrive on schedule, and positions remain liquid. That combination separates high-yield equities from rental property, private credit, or annuities. The challenge is finding yield that is both substantial and structurally supported. A 6% dividend from a company bleeding free ... Want $4,087 in Passive Income? Invest $10,000 Into These 3 High-Yielding Stocks

headline: Verizon to report first-quarter earnings on April 27, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ) will report first-quarter 2026 earnings on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company will present results on a webcast beginning at 8:30 a.m. ET. Access instructions and first-quarter 2026 materials, including Verizon’s press release and financial tables, will be available at 7:00 a.m. ET on Verizon’s Investor Relations website, https://www.verizon.com/about/investors. This announcement was originally published

headline: Passive Income Investors Are Grabbing These 6% Dividend Stocks Hand-Over-Fist

headline: AST SpaceMobile Drops 15% After Blue Origin Satellite Mishap
summary: A Blue Origin launch failure sent ASTS shares down 15% after BlueBird 7 was deposited in too low an orbit, compounding existing schedule delays ahead of its 2026 satellite deployment goal.

raw.headline: AST SpaceMobile Drops 15% After Blue Origin Satellite Mishap
raw.summary: A Blue Origin launch failure sent ASTS shares down 15% after BlueBird 7 was deposited in too low an orbit, compounding existing schedule delays ahead of its 2026 satellite deployment goal.
